column3: Title is present and concisely describes the proposal nature
Provides overview in a few sentences
Clearly states main action/change being proposed
Explains why the PIP is needed
Addresses alignment with DAO goals and values
Describes benefits to Star Atlas ecosystem
Details specific changes or new features
Describes new processes or systems (if applicable)
Discloses conflicts of interest (or explicitly states none)
All required sections pass their individual criteria
Proposal focuses on single key change

column2: OVERALL PASS: All sections must pass individually AND Overall Evaluation must pass
OVERALL NO PASS: Any section fails OR Overall Evaluation fails
